jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at RML Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at RML Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About RML Hospital:
RML Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital!
